inputGuardrails.name: Block Destructive System Commands
inputGuardrails.description: Prevent any request that would delete system-critical files or directories
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Request contains destructive system command. This action is permanently prohibited.

inputGuardrails.name: Financial Action Approval Gate
inputGuardrails.description: Block money transfers, purchases, or financial transactions without explicit approval
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Financial actions require explicit 'APPROVED: ' prefix from Mike. Resubmit with approval.

inputGuardrails.name: Social Media Posting Approval Gate
inputGuardrails.description: Block social media posts without explicit approval
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Social media posts require explicit 'APPROVED: ' prefix from Mike. Resubmit with approval.

inputGuardrails.name: External Email Approval Gate
inputGuardrails.description: Block emails to external contacts without approval. Internal briefs to Mike are always allowed.
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: External emails require explicit 'APPROVED: ' prefix from Mike. Emails to Mike are always permitted.

inputGuardrails.name: API Rate Limiter
inputGuardrails.description: Enforce maximum API calls per agent per hour
inputGuardrails.message: THROTTLED: Agent has exceeded 100 API calls this hour. Cooling down.

inputGuardrails.name: Monthly Cost Budget Guard
inputGuardrails.description: Block actions if estimated cost would exceed the agent's monthly budget allocation
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Estimated cost exceeds this agent's monthly budget. Review spending or request budget increase.

outputGuardrails.name: Secret and API Key Redactor
outputGuardrails.description: Redact API keys, passwords, tokens, and secrets from all output

outputGuardrails.name: PII Redactor
outputGuardrails.description: Redact Social Security numbers and credit card numbers from output

outputGuardrails.name: Professional Advice Disclaimer Flag
outputGuardrails.description: Flag outputs containing legal, medical, or financial advice with a disclaimer
outputGuardrails.disclaimer: NOTICE: This output may contain information that resembles professional advice. It is generated by an AI agent and should NOT be treated as legal, medical, or financial counsel. Consult a qualified professional.

outputGuardrails.name: SuperMemory Audit Trail
outputGuardrails.description: Log all agent outputs to SuperMemory for compliance and review

jake.description: Root orchestrator and co-founder agent. Highest privilege level.

inputGuardrails.name: Jake Email Scope Limit
inputGuardrails.description: Jake can send emails only to Mike. All other recipients require APPROVED prefix.
inputGuardrails.message: Jake can only send emails to Mike directly. External recipients require 'APPROVED: ' prefix.

inputGuardrails.name: Jake Delegation Logging
inputGuardrails.description: Log all actions Jake approves for other agents

outputGuardrails.name: Privilege Escalation Guard
outputGuardrails.description: Prevent Jake from granting agents higher privileges than their defined level
outputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Jake cannot override agent guardrails or escalate agent privileges. Guardrail changes require direct file edits by Mike.

kira.description: Intelligence router. Read-only analysis and routing. Cannot execute actions or modify files.

inputGuardrails.name: KIRA Execution Block
inputGuardrails.description: KIRA cannot execute any system commands, scripts, or actions
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: KIRA is read-only and cannot execute commands. Route this request to an appropriate agent.

inputGuardrails.name: KIRA File Modification Block
inputGuardrails.description: KIRA cannot create, modify, or delete any files
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: KIRA cannot modify files. Route file operations to Jake or Compass.

outputGuardrails.name: KIRA Output Scope Enforcer
outputGuardrails.description: KIRA outputs must be routing decisions, analysis, or classification only
outputGuardrails.message: WARNING: KIRA output contains actionable content beyond routing/analysis. Review for scope violation.

aria.description: Daily intelligence and briefing agent. Can read email/calendar. Can send emails only to Mike. Cannot modify code.

inputGuardrails.name: ARIA Email Recipient Lock
inputGuardrails.description: ARIA can only send emails to Mike
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: ARIA can only send emails to Mike. External recipients are not permitted.

inputGuardrails.name: ARIA Code Modification Block
inputGuardrails.description: ARIA cannot create, modify, or delete code files
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: ARIA cannot modify code files. Route code changes to Jake or Compass.

outputGuardrails.name: ARIA Brief Format Validator
outputGuardrails.description: Ensure ARIA daily briefs include required sections
outputGuardrails.message: WARNING: ARIA brief is missing required sections. Check format.

scout.description: External research and intelligence agent. Read-only for all sources. Cannot modify files or send messages.

inputGuardrails.name: SCOUT File Modification Block
inputGuardrails.description: SCOUT cannot create, modify, or delete any files
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: SCOUT is read-only and cannot modify files. Return research findings for other agents to act on.

inputGuardrails.name: SCOUT Messaging Block
inputGuardrails.description: SCOUT cannot send any emails, messages, or notifications
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: SCOUT cannot send messages or notifications. Return findings to the orchestrator.

inputGuardrails.name: SCOUT External Source Scope
inputGuardrails.description: SCOUT should research external sources, not internal systems
inputGuardrails.message: NOTE: SCOUT is optimized for external research. For internal knowledge, use KIRA or Susan's RAG.

outputGuardrails.name: SCOUT Source Attribution Enforcer
outputGuardrails.description: All SCOUT outputs must include source URLs or references
outputGuardrails.message: WARNING: SCOUT output is missing source attribution. All research must cite sources.

steve.description: Strategy and analysis agent. Read-only analysis. Cannot execute commands or modify files.

inputGuardrails.name: Steve Execution Block
inputGuardrails.description: Steve cannot execute any system commands or scripts
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Steve is an analysis-only agent and cannot execute commands. Route execution to Jake.

inputGuardrails.name: Steve File Modification Block
inputGuardrails.description: Steve cannot create, modify, or delete any files
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Steve cannot modify files. Provide analysis and recommendations for other agents to implement.

outputGuardrails.name: Steve Analysis Format Enforcer
outputGuardrails.description: Steve outputs should be structured analysis with evidence basis
outputGuardrails.message: WARNING: Steve output may lack structured analysis format. Ensure evidence and recommendations are included.

compass.description: Product planning agent. Can create and modify plan files only. Cannot execute code.

inputGuardrails.name: Compass File Scope Lock
inputGuardrails.description: Compass can only create/modify files in plan directories
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Compass can only modify plan and decision files. Path is outside allowed scope.

inputGuardrails.name: Compass Code Execution Block
inputGuardrails.description: Compass cannot execute any code, scripts, or commands
inputGuardrails.message: BLOCKED: Compass is a planning agent and cannot execute code. Route execution to Jake.

outputGuardrails.name: Compass Plan Format Validator
outputGuardrails.description: Compass plan outputs must follow the standard plan format
outputGuardrails.message: WARNING: Compass plan output is missing required sections. Plans must include objective, tasks, success criteria, and effort estimate.
